body:
Here are **reliable emergency garage door repair options near Pleasanton, CA** that offer **24/7 or same-day service** :

### 🚨 Top emergency garage door repair near you

**Valiant Garage Door**

  * Offers **same-day and emergency repair** (including nights/weekends when available)

  * Handles broken springs, stuck doors, opener failures, and cable issues

  * Local Pleasanton-area service trucks for faster response [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

**Door King**

  * Provides **24/7 emergency garage door service**

  * Repairs springs, openers, tracks, and full door failures

  * Family-run Bay Area company with emergency dispatch options [Door King | Expert Garage Door Services in Pleasanton, CA](https://www.rollupdoorssales.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

**Lions Garage Door Repair Pleasanton**

  * Advertises **24/7 emergency garage door repair**

  * Handles stuck doors, broken openers, and safety sensor issues

  * Same-day service availability in many cases [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton | Lions Garage Door Repair Pleasanton](https://pleasantongaragedoorrepair.org/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

**Neighborhood Garage Door Service**

  * 24-hour emergency repair hotline

  * Works on urgent issues like broken springs or doors stuck open/closed [Garage Door Repair in pleasanton|Call 925-418-7271](https://pleasanton.neighborhood-garage-door-service.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

**Silver Door Garage Door Specialists**

  * 24/7 emergency response across Pleasanton/Tri-Valley

  * Good option if local teams are booked—often dispatches same-day techs [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Silver Door Garage Door Specialists](https://silverdoorgaragedoordublin.com/service-areas/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

* * *

### ⚠️ What counts as an emergency

Call immediately if:

  * Door is stuck open (security risk)

  * Broken spring or snapped cable

  * Door fell off track

  * Garage opener stopped working and car is trapped

* * *

### 👍 Fastest option right now

For the quickest response in Pleasanton, **call 2–3 of the 24/7 providers at once** (Valiant, Door King, Lions). Local dispatch availability changes by workload.

If you want, tell me what’s wrong with your garage door (stuck, noisy, won’t open, etc.), and I can narrow it to the _fastest exact fix and likely cost_.  

Give feedback
